com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXGraphicConversions

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    IXAbstractLogicDiagram, IXBackshellSymbol, IXBaseSymbol, IXBorderSymbol, IXCommentSymbol, IXDeviceSymbol, IXDiagram, IXElectricalSymbol, IXFunctionDiagram, IXGroundSymbol, IXHarnessDiagram, IXLogicDiagram, IXSpliceSymbol, IXSymbol

    @NotToBeImplemented
public interface IXGraphicConversions
    Interface to provide conversions of diagrams to various formats

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static class  IXGraphicConversions.GenerateLegacySVG
      Class specifies the format of file while printing to SVG.
      static class  IXGraphicConversions.XBaseContext 
      static class  IXGraphicConversions.XCGMContext 
      static class  IXGraphicConversions.XDXFContext
      Class grouping the input parameters needed for DXF conversion of a diagram.
      static class  IXGraphicConversions.XPDFColorChoice
      Specifies the choice of colors when printing to PDF.
      static class  IXGraphicConversions.XPDFContext
      Class grouping the input parameters needed for PDF conversion of a diagram.
      static class  IXGraphicConversions.XPDFMargins
      Holds margin settings used in generated PDF files
      static class  IXGraphicConversions.XPDFPageSizeChoice
      Specifies the page size when printing to PDF.
      static class  IXGraphicConversions.XPDFPaperOrientationChoice
      Specifies the page orientation when printing to PDF.
      static class  IXGraphicConversions.XPDFPrintableAreaChoice
      Specifies the printable area of a diagram when printing to PDF.
      static class  IXGraphicConversions.XPNGContext
      Class which need to be used as input while requesting for PNG of a diagram.
      static class  IXGraphicConversions.XPNGDimensionContext
      Class which needs to be used as input while requesting for PNG of a diagram for a specific dimension.
      static class  IXGraphicConversions.XPrintContext
      Class representing all input parameters for printing diagrams to file.
      static class  IXGraphicConversions.XPrintDerivativeSelection
      Specifies if harness derivative designs should be included when printing to file.
      static class  IXGraphicConversions.XPrintPDFContext
      Class representing all input parameters for printing diagrams to PDF.
      static class  IXGraphicConversions.XPrintRevisionSelection
      Specifies the design revisions to be included when printing to file.
      static class  IXGraphicConversions.XPrintScope
      Specifies the scope for included diagrams when printing to file.
      static class  IXGraphicConversions.XSVGContext
      Class which need to be used as input while requesting for SVG of a diagram.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int DEFAULT_PNG_HEIGHT 
      static int DEFAULT_PNG_WIDTH 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void getCGM(java.io.OutputStream ostream, IXGraphicConversions.XCGMContext theXCGMContext)
      Converts the diagram to a CGM format.
      void getDXF(java.io.OutputStream ostream, IXGraphicConversions.XDXFContext context)
      Converts the diagram to a DXF format.
      void getPDF(java.io.OutputStream ostream, IXGraphicConversions.XPDFContext context)
      Converts the diagram to a PDF format.
      void getPNG(java.awt.image.BufferedImage writer, IXGraphicConversions.XPNGContext context)
      Convert the diagram to an PNG format according to the context information supplied and fill the input writer accordingly.
      void getSVG(java.io.OutputStream ostream, IXGraphicConversions.XSVGContext context)
      Convert the diagram to an SVG format according to the context information supplied and fill the OutputStream accordingly.
      void getSVG(java.io.StringWriter writer, IXGraphicConversions.XSVGContext context)
      Convert the diagram to an SVG format according to the context information supplied and fill the input writer accordingly.

    • Field Detail

      • DEFAULT_PNG_HEIGHT

        static final int DEFAULT_PNG_HEIGHT
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

        static final int DEFAULT_PNG_WIDTH
        See Also:

    • Method Detail

      • getPNG

        void getPNG(java.awt.image.BufferedImage writer,
            IXGraphicConversions.XPNGContext context)
        Convert the diagram to an PNG format according to the context information supplied and fill the input writer accordingly.
        Parameters:
        writer - BufferedImage object is created and passed to this method and this method converts diagram to PNG format and write it into this supplied writer object .
        context - Configurable input to PNG conversion

      • getSVG

        void getSVG(java.io.StringWriter writer,
            IXGraphicConversions.XSVGContext context)
        Convert the diagram to an SVG format according to the context information supplied and fill the input writer accordingly.
        Parameters:
        writer - StringWriter object is created and passed to this method and this method converts diagram to SVG format and write it into this supplied writer object .
        context - Configurable input to SVG conversion

      • getSVG

        void getSVG(java.io.OutputStream ostream,
            IXGraphicConversions.XSVGContext context)
        Convert the diagram to an SVG format according to the context information supplied and fill the OutputStream accordingly.
        Parameters:
        ostream - output stream is created and passed to this method and this method converts diagram to SVG format and write it into this supplied writer object .
        context - Configurable input to SVG conversion

      • getDXF

        void getDXF(java.io.OutputStream ostream,
            IXGraphicConversions.XDXFContext context)
        Converts the diagram to a DXF format.
        Parameters:
        ostream - The output stream to write the DXF data to
        context - DXF conversion parameters

      • getPDF

        void getPDF(java.io.OutputStream ostream,
            IXGraphicConversions.XPDFContext context)
        Converts the diagram to a PDF format.
        Parameters:
        ostream - The output stream to write the DXF data to
        context - DXF conversion parameters

      • getCGM

        void getCGM(java.io.OutputStream ostream,
            IXGraphicConversions.XCGMContext theXCGMContext)
        Converts the diagram to a CGM format.
        Parameters:
        ostream - The output stream to write the CGM data to
        theXCGMContext - CGM conversion parameters (as the XCGMContext class for details).
